Release notes detailing a bug fix for phone app disconnection after firmware updates.

# Purpose
The content documents a bug fix in the software. It describes the resolution of an issue where the phone application would disconnect immediately after a firmware update. This information is useful for tracking changes and understanding improvements made to the software.
